name: Maroubra
heroAlt: Custom joinery and kitchen cabinetry reference relevant to Maroubra homes and apartments
metaTitle: Custom Joinery & Renovations Maroubra | InsideOut Joinery & Renos
metaDescription: Maroubra custom joinery and renovation services including kitchens, wardrobes, bathrooms and storage. Eastern Suburbs team. Free quotes. Call InsideOut Joinery today.
intro: Maroubra homes span a wide range — from older brick family homes and post-war units to newer apartment developments close to the beach. What most of them share is a need for joinery that solves a real problem: too little storage, a kitchen that no longer works for how the family lives, or a bathroom that needs a proper rebuild rather than a refresh.
localContext: Whether the brief is a full kitchen renovation, a walk-in wardrobe, or smarter storage through a living area, the goal is cabinetry that suits the way the home is actually used — not just something that looks good in a photo.
projectReferenceNote: The Darlinghurst fitout is a strong reference for the kind of considered, space-efficient joinery that works well in Maroubra apartments and mid-sized homes where every room needs to pull its weight.
whyChoose: Kitchen, wardrobe and bathroom joinery for homes and apartments across the Eastern Suburbs
Storage solutions built around how the home actually functions
Material and finish choices suited to coastal and family living
Clear quote process from initial brief through to installation

faqs.question: Do you do kitchen renovations in Maroubra?
faqs.answer: Yes. We quote kitchen renovations, custom cabinetry and full joinery fitouts for homes and apartments in Maroubra and the surrounding Eastern Suburbs.

faqs.question: Can you work on an apartment as well as a house?
faqs.answer: Yes. We are comfortable working in apartments, townhouses and freestanding homes across the Eastern Suburbs.

faqs.question: Do I need full plans to get a quote?
faqs.answer: No. Photos of the existing space and a brief description of what you are trying to achieve are enough to start the conversation.

faqs.question: Do you handle both the joinery and the renovation work?
faqs.answer: Yes. We can manage the joinery scope only, or take on a broader renovation that includes tiling, plumbing coordination and the full fit-out.

ctaText: If your Maroubra home needs a kitchen renovation, new wardrobes or smarter storage, we can help plan the right scope and budget for your project.
